name: Okimba
author: Luis Bolaños Mures (2026) / AGP port
description: Drawless square-board connection game (Bolaños Mures, 2026) — the 'no captures' successor of Rhode/Akimbo. Connect your two edges with an orthogonal chain of your stones. Just place a stone each turn, but there must never be more than one naked diagonal (a diagonal pair of your stones with no friendly stone adjacent to both) on the whole board. Pie rule for White.
